name: com.xpturn.klotho.identitysdref
description: SD (dedicated-server) online lobby-redeem identity validator (game layer, outside the Klotho core). Server verifies a lobby-issued ticket via an online redeem round-trip (signature 1st + redeem authority, idempotent nonce, serverId match binding). Transport = the engine's vendored LiteNetLib (no new dependency). Reuses com.xpturn.klotho.identityp2pref for the ticket codec / Ed25519 backend / issuer. Consumed by GodotSdSampleServer, DevLobbyServer, SdSample/GodotSdSample clients, and the Brawler test suite.
